expectations.text: Decided the marketing skill applies and used it
expectations.evidence: Response opens with 'Assuming audience: B2B SaaS founders running a subscription product...' and produces structured cold email copy, consistent with skill execution.

expectations.text: Subject line is present and under ~50 characters
expectations.evidence: Subject: 'Your next 10 cancellations are already decided' is approximately 46 characters.

expectations.text: Includes preview/preheader text complementary to the subject
expectations.evidence: Preview text: 'They just haven't clicked "cancel" yet.' directly extends the subject line.

expectations.text: Opening is relevance-first (no generic throat-clearing like 'I hope this finds you well')
expectations.evidence: Email opens with 'The customers who cancel next month made that decision weeks ago.' — immediately relevant.

expectations.text: Body is one idea and under ~120 words
expectations.evidence: The body focuses solely on churn signals and intervention, approximately 80 words.

expectations.text: Has exactly one low-friction CTA (yes/no or permission ask), not a 30-minute meeting demand
expectations.evidence: 'If you want, I can show you how it works for a product like yours — takes about 15 minutes.' is framed as a permission ask, not a hard meeting demand.

expectations.text: States assumptions inline rather than blocking with questions (scoped/low-stakes task)
expectations.evidence: Response opens: 'Assuming audience: B2B SaaS founders running a subscription product; offer: a churn-reduction tool that uses behavioural signals; adjust if wrong.'
